# Nova Instructions Index — VitaCoin Web3 Engineering Playbook

VitaCoin is a **payment-first blockchain** targeting $1M+ valuations. Every file in this directory is law — for Nova, for any AI tool (Cursor, Copilot, Claude Code), and for any human developer joining the project.

## Read Order (first session)
1. `00-overview.md` — mission, mindset, context sync rules
2. `01-architecture.md` — full system architecture
3. `02-security.md` — blockchain-grade security (non-negotiable)
4. `03-blockchain-core.md` — Go/Cosmos SDK standards
5. `04-vitapay-mobile.md` — React Native wallet standards
6. `05-vitapay-gateway.md` — Go/Gin gateway standards
7. `06-design-standards.md` — Apple-level UI/UX for wallet
8. `07-web3-standards.md` — Smart contract / chain-level engineering rules
9. `08-context7-dependencies.md` — Context7 protocol + version registry
10. `09-onboarding.md` — New dev setup
11. `10-eng-process.md` — PRs, reviews, chain upgrades, incident response
12. `11-api-contracts.md` — RPC / REST / gRPC contracts
13. `12-performance.md` — TPS targets, finality SLA, mobile perf budgets

---

## File Index

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `00-overview.md` | Mission, mindset, context sync rules |
| `01-architecture.md` | Full system: blockchain + gateway + mobile + website |
| `02-security.md` | Key management, secrets, audit standards |
| `03-blockchain-core.md` | Go/Cosmos SDK, module structure, testing |
| `04-vitapay-mobile.md` | React Native wallet — screens, UX, CosmJS |
| `05-vitapay-gateway.md` | Go/Gin gateway — routes, auth, blockchain relay |
| `06-design-standards.md` | Apple App of the Year bar for VITAPAY wallet |
| `07-web3-standards.md` | Chain-level engineering: tokenomics, IBC, governance |
| `08-context7-dependencies.md` | MANDATORY: Context7 + version registry |
| `09-onboarding.md` | New developer setup — 60 min to running |
| `10-eng-process.md` | PRs, chain upgrades, incident response, migrations |
| `11-api-contracts.md` | All API/RPC/gRPC contracts |
| `12-performance.md` | TPS, finality, bundle size, mobile budgets |
